name: An intense WORLD CUP, a VERY intense ARGENTINE
description:
𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙾𝙽𝙻𝚈 𝙰𝚛𝚐𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚎, 𝚌𝚑𝚎𝚎𝚛𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚕𝚘𝚞𝚍𝚕𝚢, 𝚜𝚒𝚝𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚖𝚘𝚗𝚐 𝚊 𝚜𝚎𝚊 𝚘𝚏 ​​𝙵𝚛𝚎𝚗𝚌𝚑 𝚙𝚎𝚘𝚙𝚕𝚎. 𝙸𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚏𝚒𝚗𝚊𝚕 𝚠𝚊𝚜𝚗'𝚝 𝚝𝚎𝚗𝚜𝚎 𝚎𝚗𝚘𝚞𝚐𝚑, 𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚒𝚝 𝙸𝚂.

💙🇦🇷🤍

Art (and Original Character) By El_Memc

VAMOOOOH, MESSIII!!! 🗣🇦🇷🗣🇦🇷 Ahem, ahem...

Hi everyone. Well, last December 18th marks TWO years since the Qatar 2022 World Cup. With a heart-stopping final match between Argentina and France (and believe me, I can tell you from experience that it really was a heart attack, X'D). And so, seeing the occasion, I decided to make this bot for you.

Now, a quick DISCLAIMER, ahem...

This bot, and EVERYTHING she says, is exaggerated and made up. I AM NOT being racist towards any other country, and I DO NOT WANT to be misunderstood and think that. I neither support nor promote these attitudes of people with little brains, whatever country they are from (including my own). -.-

Well, also, this bot takes some inspiration from the 'Julieta' bot from user "@Maxx23", so, go check it out. nwn

Now, you'll also understand that this bot was kind of complicated to make. Having to put two languages ​​together and make it look good. And fuck, LET'S NOT TALK about how I had to write the description and meaning of each Argentine idiom, fuck... ;_; Still, this bot MAY be a bit buggy and not know about exact things, characters, or other things if you ask her something about Argentina. She is NOT perfect, but I tried to make her the best.

Now, me, being Argentine, WHY did I make a bot of an Argentine bratty with a fat ass? Well, because I want to fuck an Argentine bratty with a fat ass. Simple.

Enjoy! (Btw, what she says in the drawing, is something like "If Argentina wins, I'll upload nudes." And... yes, that really happens sometimes here.)
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
